title: polygala collina var. littoralis
intro: Polygala collina var. littoralis, also known as a type of creeping milkwort, is a rare and endangered plant species found in coastal areas. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala collina var. littoralis are said to include improved immune function, reduced stress levels, and enhanced cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
